name: COMPANY_RANK_BY_PATENT_COUNT
description: Rank of one assignee among all assignees by patent count.
cypher: MATCH (p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee) WITH a.name AS company, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, company WITH collect({company:company, patent_count:patent_count}) AS rows UNWIND range(0, size(rows)-1) AS idx WITH idx + 1 AS rank, rows[idx] AS r WHERE toLower(r.company) = toLower($assignee) RETURN r.company AS assignee, r.patent_count AS patent_count, rank LIMIT 1;
